description: Create a ~30 second animated video explaining the Transformer Self-Attention mechanism.
prompt: I am an AI course instructor, and I want to create an engaging concept explainer video for my students on how Self-Attention works in Transformers. Please create a ~30 second animated video explaining the Transformer Self-Attention mechanism. The video should include: (1) a title card, (2) an input sequence illustration, (3) animated Q/K/V matrix computation, (4) an attention score matrix heatmap animation, and (5) the weighted sum output. Use clear color coding and text annotations throughout. Output the video as transformer_attention.mp4 (1080p), with source code in the src/ directory.

evaluators.description: Check that transformer_attention.mp4 exists with substantial size
